contract.goal: Implement manifest read + write with round-trip tests against Phase 1 fixtures.
acceptance_criteria: Both functions are test-covered against fixture round-trip
writeManifest produces stable key order on output
rules_applied: stdlib only — no new runtime deps
disqualifiers: exposes a partial API that Phase 3 has to retrofit

actions: Authored cli/lib/manifest.test.ts with round-trip + stability tests
Verified write produces sorted keys for diff stability

changes_since_previous: Adds the manifest read/write lib; the first verb-feeding module of Phase 2.
notes_for_pr: Manifest writer is now the canonical path to manifest.json — direct fs writes elsewhere are a substrate antipattern.
Round-trip tests cover all four PhaseStatus transitions and the optional PR-info attachment.
